commands: Conduct a thorough analysis of the impact of composite indexes on write performance, especially in high-transaction scenarios, to ensure that the proposed indexing strategy does not degrade overall system performance.
Evaluate the distribution of data within the indexed columns to avoid performance issues that may arise from non-uniform data distributions, which could lead to inefficient index usage.

Incorporate a discussion on the trade-offs between read and write performance when using fewer indexes in high concurrency environments, particularly during peak loads, to ensure balanced performance across all operations.

Provide a more detailed assessment of the complexity and overhead associated with frequent `REINDEX` operations in high-transaction environments, and suggest alternative strategies for index maintenance that minimize disruption.
